'''Carthasians''' were green [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]] indigenous to [[Benja-Rihn]] that also possessed large, orange eyes with black pupils, set-back nostrils on their large upper jaws and they had a collection of small green stubs visually similar to hair.

{{Species-stub}}
